title: TurboCharged
description:
🌀 Minecraft SuperCharged – FPS Boost Modpack (Fabric 1.20.1)
Ultra-lightweight modpack designed for low-end PCs, featuring Sodium, Lithium, Starlight & more. Get massive FPS gains, reduced RAM usage, and zero lag. No visual fluff—just pure performance.
body:
🚀 Minecraft SuperCharged – The Ultimate FPS Boost Modpack!
Version: 1.20.1 (Fabric)
Performance Focused • Ultra Lightweight • Low-End Friendly

Say goodbye to lag forever. Minecraft SuperCharged is a finely tuned FPS-boosting modpack designed for low-end PCs and laptops. Powered by cutting-edge optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and FerriteCore, this pack delivers buttery-smooth gameplay—even on potato hardware.

Whether you’re running Intel UHD Graphics or just want maximum performance, SuperCharged gives you:

🚀 +300% FPS Boost with core rendering and tick optimizers

🧠 Reduced RAM Usage for smoother multitasking

🌑 Zero Bloat – no unnecessary visual mods or heavy extras

🖥️ Shader Compatible with bundled Iris + Lite Shaders (optional)

⚙️ Pre-Tweaked Configs for maximum performance out-of-the-box

💡 Perfect For:
Low-end or school laptops

- PvP and survival players who need FPS over fancy graphics

- Modded players who want stability + performance

📦 Mods Included (Core Boosters):
Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, EntityCulling, LazyDFU, MemoryLeakFix, Krypton, FPS Reducer, and more.

🎮 Plug, Play, and Lag No More.
Download now and feel your Minecraft world run like never before.
